use std::fmt::Write;

fn build_csv(rows: &[Row]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for row in rows {
        // GOOD: write! reuses the existing buffer
        writeln!(output, "{},{},{},{}", row.id, row.name, row.value, row.ts).unwrap();
    }
    output
}

fn build_log_line(entries: &[LogEntry]) -> String {
    let mut result = String::new();
    for entry in entries {
        // GOOD: push_str and write! avoid intermediate allocations
        write!(result, " | {}: {}", entry.timestamp, entry.message).unwrap();
    }
    result
}
